name: social-network-api
description: REST API for users, thoughts, reactions, and friend relationships using Express, MongoDB, and Mongoose.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check config/connection.js && node --check controllers/user-controller.js && node --check controllers/thought-controller.js && node --check models/User.js && node --check models/Thought.js && node --check routes/index.js && node --check routes/api/index.js && node --check routes/api/user-routes.js && node --check routes/api/thought-routes.js && node --check utils/request-utils.js

author: Boyd Roberts
